Shipping early 2023.

Web3 in your Pocket

  • Trade Tokens
  • Mint NFTs
  • Game On-Chain
  • Access dApps

A premium mobile experience that enables you to trade tokens while waiting in line for coffee, mint NFTs on your morning commute, and have instant access to the dApps you love most, anywhere, anytime - all powered by Android.

  • Copy address
  • Change wallet
  • Disconnect

dApp Store

Use all your favorite Solana DeFi protocols, NFT marketplaces, and Web3 apps on the go

Transact seamlessly across dApps anywhere, anytime

Access exclusive dApp features only on Saga

Discover the newest dApps right from your phone

Learn more

Seed Vault

Seamlessly onboard onto your favorite Solana wallet and securely transact across dApps with ease.

Seed Vault protects your seeds from malicious actors via secure hardware and AES encryption.

Wallets never have direct access to your seeds.

Approve any transaction in an instant with the tap of a finger.

Learn more

Build on SMS Today

Solana Mobile Stack provides a comprehensive toolkit and an Android build environment that simplifies building mobile-first dapps.

Integrate the SDK to extend your dApp's functionality

Easy dApp store submission and greater distribution

Secure transaction signing for users thanks to Seed Vault

Apply for a grant from Solana Mobile's $10 million fund

Learn more

A Premium Hardware Experience

Solana Mobile teamed up with OSOM to integrate the Solana Mobile Stack with a flagship quality device. Saga delivers premium hardware, clean Android, and Web3 in a phone you’ll love to use.

6.67”OLED Display
512GB Storage
12GB RAM
Snapdragon 8+ Gen 1
Mobile Platform
Integrated Secure Element
Learn more
